Part.Source:
For Each Order EmpCod, NfsCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where NfsCod = &NfsCod
NfsTotBasCofins = &WizardData.Totais.NfsTotBasCofins NfsTotBasPIS = &WizardData.Totais.NfsTotBasPIS NfsTotDesc = &WizardData.Totais.NfsTotDesc NfsTotISS = &WizardData.Totais.NfsTotISS NfsTotCofins = &WizardData.Totais.NfsTotCofins NfsTotIR = &WizardData.Totais.NfsTotIR NfsTotCPP = &WizardData.Totais.NfsTotCPP NfsTotPIS= &WizardData.Totais.NfsTotPIS NfsTotINSS = &WizardData.Totais.NfsTotINSS NfsTotCSLL = &WizardData.Totais.NfsTotCSLL NfsTotOut = &WizardData.Totais.NfsTotOut
NfsPerISS = &WizardData.Totais.NfsPerISS NfsPerCofins = &WizardData.Totais.NfsPerCofins NfsPerIR = &WizardData.Totais.NfsPerIR NfsPerCPP = &WizardData.Totais.NfsPerCPP NfsPerPIS = &WizardData.Totais.NfsPerPIS NfsPerINSS = &WizardData.Totais.NfsPerINSS NfsPerCSLL = &WizardData.Totais.NfsPerCSLL NfsPerOut = &WizardData.Totais.NfsPerOut
NfsRetISS = &WizardData.Totais.NfsRetISS NfsRetCofins = &WizardData.Totais.NfsRetCofins NfsRetIR = &WizardData.Totais.NfsRetIR NfsRetCPP = &WizardData.Totais.NfsRetCPP NfsRetPIS = &WizardData.Totais.NfsRetPIS NfsRetINSS = &WizardData.Totais.NfsRetINSS NfsRetCSLL = &WizardData.Totais.NfsRetCSLL NfsRetOut = &WizardData.Totais.NfsRetOut
if NfsTipNF = 'S' NfsTotCofins = &WizardData.Totais.NfsTotCofins_Nac NfsPerCofins = &WizardData.Totais.NfsPerCofins_Nac NfsTotPIS = &WizardData.Totais.NfsTotPIS_Nac NfsPerPIS = &WizardData.Totais.NfsPerPIS_Nac NfsTotISS = &WizardData.Totais.NfsTotISS_Nac NfsPerISS = &WizardData.Totais.NfsPerISS_Nac NfsPerCSLL = &WizardData.Totais.NfsPerCSLL_Nac NfsPerIR = &WizardData.Totais.NfsPerIR_Nac NfsPerCPP = &WizardData.Totais.NfsPerCPP_Nac
NfsTribAprFed = &WizardData.Totais.NfsTribAprFed NfsTribAprEst = &WizardData.Totais.NfsTribAprEst NfsTribAprMun = &WizardData.Totais.NfsTribAprMun Endif
NfsRetISSNov = &WizardData.Totais.NfsRetISSNov NfsCstPisCofins = &WizardData.Totais.NfsCstPisCofins NfsRetPisCofins = &WizardData.Totais.NfsRetPisCofins
Exit EndFor
Commit
prcTotalizaNFSe.Call(&EmpCod, &NfsCod)
